channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: Rate limit 500 req/s without pissing off clients
item.description: Cut API P99 latency from 2300 ms to 145 ms without SaaS bloat — fixed-window Redis counters with retry-aware acceptance reduced retry storms 42% to 3% and saved $168/month on cloud costs.

item.title: Schedule at 3am or 3pm? Carbon-aware deployments under
item.description: ons by 40-50% without touching code. I firs with Schedule 3am 3pm Carbon-aware — touching code.

item.title: Edge functions pay off only at 50k req/day
item.description: Cut origin server costs 30% by moving revalidations to edge functions — real latency benchmarks, CPU limits, and the 50k daily request breakpoint where Workers and Vercel Edge actually pay off.

item.title: AI junior devs hit 9x bugs faster
item.description: Ship 50% fewer bugs with AI coding tools — benchmarks, guardrails, and the exact tools that turned AI junior devs into production-ready engineers in 12 weeks

item.title: Why RAG pipelines fail in production
item.description: oduction, 42% of user queries returned no a with RAG — user intent; reality disagreed.

item.title: Freelancer burnout: how I fixed it in 8 weeks
item.description: Recovered from 80-hour freelance weeks to 1,200 billable hours a year with 250 hours for health. Margin rose from 34% to 48%, CLI from 41 to 27, and deep sleep increased by 50% using tiered contracts, stack isolation, and async workflows.

item.title: Vector databases: when they help (and when they waste
item.description: Cut vector search costs 60% with pgvector in PostgreSQL — RAM sizing, HNSW tuning, and the mistakes that spike latency to 400 ms

item.title: Switched salary to $95/hr in 18 months
item.description: Earned $18/hr locally and reached $95/hr in 18 months by open-sourcing Django tools. Includes concrete numbers, GitHub examples, and a repeatable playbook for developers in Accra, London, and Bangalore.

item.title: Cut AWS costs 40% without touching the architecture
item.description: Cut AWS bill by 40% without redesigning the stack — $540 saved on NAT Gateway alone, plus 9 other zero-code tweaks with real latency and cost data

item.title: CircleCI costs 3× GitHub Actions at 50k builds
item.description: CircleCI costs 3× GitHub Actions at 50k builds/month for Nairobi teams — real cost breakdown with $1200 savings, queue time costs, and artifact storage traps you’re ignoring.

item.title: Use event sourcing when your undo button matters
item.description: Cut audit time by 80% with event sourcing — when it helps, when it hurts, and the real latency numbers from EventStoreDB 26.0 and PostgreSQL

item.title: Schedule jobs when the grid is cleanest
item.description: Cut fintech batch costs 40% and Scope-2 emissions 35% when scheduling workloads with real-time carbon data versus fixed windows — latency numbers, API traps, and the exact Helm charts to ship.

item.title: Doctors, lawyers, scientists: who’s debugging your
item.description: h with 99.9% uptime and a 95th-percentile with Doctors lawyers scientists debugging — the flame graphs, the top three stack frames were a.

item.title: Side projects vs client work: the 40-hour balance
item.description: Cut weekend sacrifice by 51% with the time blocking pattern — measure your unpaid hours, client quality scores, and side project completion rates over 8 weeks.

item.title: RAG pipelines fail at 10k RPM
item.description: Cut RAG cost 67% and errors 92% at 10k RPM with Milvus+ClickHouse — the real stack that handles catalog churn and concurrency most tutorials ignore.

item.title: Node.js memory leak: detect it in 7 minutes flat
item.description: Cut Node.js memory leaks by 100% in production — detect leaks in 7 minutes, fix unbounded caches, closures, and Kubernetes misconfigs, with exact error messages and tools.

item.title: Queue when to queue: save yourself 3am fires
item.description: Cut 6ms latency and 80% on-call pages by swapping thread pools for RabbitMQ queues — payload tuning, prefetch traps, and the disk I/O surprise when durability matters

item.title: Run a local LLM on a laptop — here’s the catch
item.description: Cut LLM latency to under 100ms on a laptop with 16GB RAM — the real constraints, model sizes that work, and the mistakes that break the setup. local LLM setup guide with benchmarks and thermal limits.

item.title: We moved security left without slowing deploys
item.description: We cut PR merge time 31% and critical vulnerabilities 87% by turning security into a measurable signal instead of a gate. Here’s how we instrumented GitHub Actions, Kubernetes, and Prometheus to shift security left without slowing deploys.

item.title: AI reads your codebase: the context gap you missed
item.description: Cut onboarding time by 38% with repository intelligence — measure grep loops and onboarding hours before you index your 50k-file monorepo
